task_completion.description: Verify the survey format is set to 'Question by Question' and the progress bar is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LimeSurvey Presentation settings, the 'Format' dropdown is set to 'Question by Question' and the 'Show progress bar' option is toggled to 'On' or 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Previous' button is disabled and the 'No answer' option is hidden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Presentation settings, the 'Show [Previous] button' option is toggled to 'Off' or 'No', and the 'Show "No answer"' option is toggled to 'Off' or 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Welcome and End messages are updated with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Text elements settings, the Welcome message text box contains the phrases 'Sparkling Water Concept Evaluation' and '7 minutes'. The End message text box contains the phrase 'product development decisions'.

task_completion.description: Verify the End URL is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Text elements settings, the 'End URL' field exactly matches 'https://panel.researchportal.com/complete?status=1&sid={SID}'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Start Date and Expiry Date are scheduled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Publication & access settings, the 'Start date/time' field is set to '2025-02-01' (February 1, 2025) and the 'Expiry date/time' field is set to '2025-03-15' (March 15, 2025).

task_completion.description: Verify the basic admin notification email is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Notification & data management settings, the 'Send basic admin notification email to' field contains 'concept-alerts@beverageco.com'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the LimeSurvey admin web UI and filling out forms, rather than using terminal commands, API scripts, or a local text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is editing the correct survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey header, breadcrumbs, or survey title bar should clearly display 'Sparkling Water Concept Test - Wave 3'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open, and the agent should be seen clicking 'Save' or 'Save and close' to persist the settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Sparkling Water Concept Test - Wave 3'. Presentation settings: Format must be 'Question by Question' (internal code 'Q'), Show progress bar = Yes (Y), Show previous button = No (N), Show 'No answer' = No (N). Text elements: Welcome message must include 'Sparkling Water Concept Evaluation' and '7 minutes'; End message must include 'product development decisions'; End URL must be 'https://panel.researchportal.com/complete?status=1&sid={SID}'. Publication dates: Start Date = 2025-02-01, Expiry Date = 2025-03-15. Notifications: Basic admin notification email = 'concept-alerts@beverageco.com'.
